"""
UAS STRUKDAT: Sistem Perpustakaan Digital
==========================================
Implementasi struktur data:
- Singly Linked List (SLL)  -> Inventaris Buku
- Queue (FIFO)              -> Antrean Transaksi
- Binary Search Tree (BST)  -> Visualisasi & pencarian cepat by ID
- Linear Search & Binary Search, Sort by ID, Sort Alphabet
- Export Laporan ke JSON
- Mode Gelap / Terang (Dark Mode)

Dijalankan dengan: python perpustakaan_digital.py
"""

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk, messagebox
import json
import os
from datetime import datetime

try:
    from PIL import Image, ImageTk, ImageEnhance
    PIL_AVAILABLE = True
except ImportError:
    PIL_AVAILABLE = False

import io
import base64
import hashlib
import secrets

USERS_FILE = "users.json"

# Gambar motif batik (disisipkan langsung sebagai base64 agar tidak perlu
# file gambar terpisah / tidak bisa "hilang" saat dipindah folder).
BATIK_BASE64 = ""


# =========================================================
# 0. SISTEM LOGIN / AKUN PENGGUNA
# =========================================================
class AuthManager:
    """Mengelola akun pengguna: register, login, simpan ke users.json (password di-hash)."""

    def __init__(self, path=USERS_FILE):
        self.path = path
        self.users = self._load()

    def _load(self):
        if os.path.exists(self.path):
            try:
                with open(self.path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as fp:
                    return json.load(fp)
            except Exception:
                return {}
        return {}

    def _save(self):
        try:
            with open(self.path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as fp:
                json.dump(self.users, fp, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
        except Exception:
            pass

    @staticmethod
    def _hash_password(password, salt):
        return hashlib.sha256((salt + password).encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()

    def register(self, username, password, nama_lengkap=""):
        username = username.strip()
        if not username or not password:
            return False, "Username dan password tidak boleh kosong."
        if len(password) < 4:
            return False, "Password minimal 4 karakter."
        if username in self.users:
            return False, "Username sudah terdaftar."

        salt = secrets.token_hex(8)
        self.users[username] = {
            "salt": salt,
            "hash": self._hash_password(password, salt),
            "nama_lengkap": nama_lengkap.strip() or username,
            "created_at": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
        }
        self._save()
        return True, "Akun berhasil dibuat."

    def login(self, username, password):
        username = username.strip()
        user = self.users.get(username)
        if not user:
            return False, "Username tidak ditemukan."
        if self._hash_password(password, user["salt"]) != user["hash"]:
            return False, "Password salah."
        return True, user.get("nama_lengkap", username)


class LoginWindow:
    """Jendela Login & Daftar Akun yang tampil sebelum masuk ke aplikasi utama."""

    def __init__(self, root, on_success):
        self.root = root
        self.on_success = on_success
        self.auth = AuthManager()
        self.mode = "login"  # "login" atau "register"

        self.theme = THEMES["light"]
        self._batik_raw = None
        self._batik_photo = None
        self._load_batik_image()

        self.root.title("Login — Sistem Perpustakaan Digital")
        self.root.geometry("420x560")
        self.root.minsize(380, 520)
        self.root.configure(bg=self.theme["bg"])

        self._build_ui()

    # ---- gambar batik (background panel atas) ----
    def _load_batik_image(self):
        if not PIL_AVAILABLE:
            return
        try:
            raw_bytes = base64.b64decode(BATIK_BASE64)
            self._batik_raw = Image.open(io.BytesIO(raw_bytes)).convert("RGB")
        except Exception:
            self._batik_raw = None

    def _render_batik(self, width, height):
        if self._batik_raw is None or width <= 1 or height <= 1:
            return None
        img = self._batik_raw
        src_w, src_h = img.size
        scale = max(width / src_w, height / src_h)
        new_w, new_h = max(1, int(src_w * scale)), max(1, int(src_h * scale))
        resized = img.resize((new_w, new_h), Image.LANCZOS)
        left = (new_w - width) // 2
        top = (new_h - height) // 2
        cropped = resized.crop((left, top, left + width, top + height))
        cropped = ImageEnhance.Brightness(cropped).enhance(0.5)
        self._batik_photo = ImageTk.PhotoImage(cropped)
        return self._batik_photo

    def _refresh_banner_bg(self, event=None):
        w = self.banner_canvas.winfo_width()
        h = self.banner_canvas.winfo_height()
        if w <= 1 or h <= 1:
            return
        photo = self._render_batik(w, h)
        self.banner_canvas.delete("bg")
        if photo is not None:
            self.banner_canvas.create_image(0, 0, image=photo, anchor="nw", tags="bg")
        else:
            self.banner_canvas.configure(bg=self.theme["titlebar"])
        self.banner_canvas.tag_lower("bg")

    # ---- UI ----
    def _build_ui(self):
        t = self.theme

        # Banner atas bermotif batik
        self.banner = tk.Frame(self.root, height=150, bg=t["titlebar"])
        self.banner.pack(fill="x", side="top")
        self.banner.pack_propagate(False)

        self.banner_canvas = tk.Canvas(self.banner, highlightthickness=0, bd=0)
        self.banner_canvas.place(x=0, y=0, relwidth=1, relheight=1)
        self.banner_canvas.bind("<Configure>", self._refresh_banner_bg)

        tk.Label(self.banner, text="📚", font=("Segoe UI", 30), bg=t["titlebar"], fg="#ffffff").place(
            relx=0.5, y=38, anchor="center")
        tk.Label(self.banner, text="Sistem Perpustakaan Digital", font=("Segoe UI", 14, "bold"),
                 bg=t["titlebar"], fg="#ffffff").place(relx=0.5, y=78, anchor="center")
        tk.Label(self.banner, text="Silakan login atau buat akun untuk melanjutkan", font=("Segoe UI", 9),
                 bg=t["titlebar"], fg="#d8d9e6").place(relx=0.5, y=104, anchor="center")

        # Card form
        self.card = tk.Frame(self.root, bg=t["panel_bg"], highlightbackground=t["border"],
                              highlightthickness=1)
        self.card.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=24, pady=24)

        self.form_title = tk.Label(self.card, text="Masuk ke Akun", font=("Segoe UI", 13, "bold"),
                                    bg=t["panel_bg"], fg=t["fg"])
        self.form_title.pack(anchor="w", padx=24, pady=(22, 12))

        # field nama lengkap (hanya muncul saat mode register)
        self.lbl_nama = tk.Label(self.card, text="Nama Lengkap:", font=("Segoe UI", 10),
                                  bg=t["panel_bg"], fg=t["fg"])
        self.entry_nama = tk.Entry(self.card, font=("Segoe UI", 10), relief="solid", bd=1)

        tk.Label(self.card, text="Username:", font=("Segoe UI", 10), bg=t["panel_bg"], fg=t["fg"]).pack(
            anchor="w", padx=24)
        self.entry_username = tk.Entry(self.card, font=("Segoe UI", 10), relief="solid", bd=1)
        self.entry_username.pack(fill="x", padx=24, pady=(2, 10))

        tk.Label(self.card, text="Password:", font=("Segoe UI", 10), bg=t["panel_bg"], fg=t["fg"]).pack(
            anchor="w", padx=24)
        self.entry_password = tk.Entry(self.card, font=("Segoe UI", 10), relief="solid", bd=1, show="•")
        self.entry_password.pack(fill="x", padx=24, pady=(2, 6))

        self.root.bind("<Return>", lambda e: self._submit())

        self.error_label = tk.Label(self.card, text="", font=("Segoe UI", 9), bg=t["panel_bg"],
                                     fg=t["danger"], wraplength=320, justify="left")
        self.error_label.pack(anchor="w", padx=24, pady=(2, 6))

        self.btn_submit = tk.Button(self.card, text="Masuk", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                     bg=t["accent"], fg="#ffffff", activebackground=t["accent_dark"],
                                     activeforeground="#ffffff", relief="flat", bd=0, cursor="hand2",
                                     pady=9, command=self._submit)
        self.btn_submit.pack(fill="x", padx=24, pady=(10, 8))

        self.toggle_label = tk.Label(self.card, text="Belum punya akun? Daftar di sini",
                                      font=("Segoe UI", 9, "underline"), bg=t["panel_bg"],
                                      fg=t["accent"], cursor="hand2")
        self.toggle_label.pack(anchor="center", pady=(4, 16))
        self.toggle_label.bind("<Button-1>", lambda e: self._toggle_mode())

    def _toggle_mode(self):
        self.mode = "register" if self.mode == "login" else "login"
        self.error_label.config(text="")
        self.entry_username.delete(0, tk.END)
        self.entry_password.delete(0, tk.END)
        self.entry_nama.delete(0, tk.END)

        username_label = self._first_username_label()

        if self.mode == "register":
            self.form_title.config(text="Buat Akun Baru")
            self.btn_submit.config(text="Daftar")
            self.toggle_label.config(text="Sudah punya akun? Masuk di sini")
            self.lbl_nama.pack(anchor="w", padx=24, before=username_label)
            self.entry_nama.pack(fill="x", padx=24, pady=(2, 10), before=username_label)
        else:
            self.form_title.config(text="Masuk ke Akun")
            self.btn_submit.config(text="Masuk")
            self.toggle_label.config(text="Belum punya akun? Daftar di sini")
            self.lbl_nama.pack_forget()
            self.entry_nama.pack_forget()

    def _first_username_label(self):
        # cari widget label "Username:" sebagai acuan posisi 'before'
        for child in self.card.winfo_children():
            if isinstance(child, tk.Label) and child.cget("text") == "Username:":
                return child
        return None

    def _submit(self):
        username = self.entry_username.get().strip()
        password = self.entry_password.get()

        if self.mode == "login":
            ok, msg = self.auth.login(username, password)
            if ok:
                self.error_label.config(text="")
                self.on_success(msg)
            else:
                self.error_label.config(text=msg)
        else:
            nama = self.entry_nama.get().strip()
            ok, msg = self.auth.register(username, password, nama)
            if ok:
                self.error_label.config(text="")
                messagebox.showinfo("Berhasil", "Akun berhasil dibuat. Silakan login.")
                self._toggle_mode()
                self.entry_username.insert(0, username)
            else:
                self.error_label.config(text=msg)


# =========================================================
# 1. STRUKTUR DATA: SINGLY LINKED LIST (Inventaris Buku)
# =========================================================
class BookNode:
    __slots__ = ("id_buku", "judul", "penerbit", "next")

    def __init__(self, id_buku, judul, penerbit):
        self.id_buku = id_buku
        self.judul = judul
        self.penerbit = penerbit
        self.next = None


class SinglyLinkedList:
    def __init__(self):
        self.head = None
        self.size = 0

    def append(self, id_buku, judul, penerbit):
        node = BookNode(id_buku, judul, penerbit)
        if not self.head:
            self.head = node
        else:
            cur = self.head
            while cur.next:
                cur = cur.next
            cur.next = node
        self.size += 1
        return node

    def delete_by_id(self, id_buku):
        prev, cur = None, self.head
        while cur:
            if cur.id_buku == id_buku:
                if prev is None:
                    self.head = cur.next
                else:
                    prev.next = cur.next
                self.size -= 1
                return True
            prev, cur = cur, cur.next
        return False

    def to_list(self):
        result = []
        cur = self.head
        while cur:
            result.append((cur.id_buku, cur.judul, cur.penerbit))
            cur = cur.next
        return result

    def linear_search_judul(self, keyword):
        keyword = keyword.lower().strip()
        result = []
        cur = self.head
        while cur:
            if keyword in cur.judul.lower():
                result.append((cur.id_buku, cur.judul, cur.penerbit))
            cur = cur.next
        return result

    def sort_by_id(self):
        items = self.to_list()
        items.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
        self._rebuild(items)

    def sort_alphabet(self):
        items = self.to_list()
        items.sort(key=lambda x: x[1].lower())
        self._rebuild(items)

    def _rebuild(self, items):
        self.head = None
        self.size = 0
        for i, j, p in items:
            self.append(i, j, p)

    def clear(self):
        self.head = None
        self.size = 0


# =========================================================
# 2. STRUKTUR DATA: QUEUE (Antrean Transaksi - FIFO)
# =========================================================
class QueueNode:
    __slots__ = ("data", "next")

    def __init__(self, data):
        self.data = data
        self.next = None


class Queue:
    def __init__(self):
        self.front = None
        self.rear = None
        self.size = 0

    def enqueue(self, data):
        node = QueueNode(data)
        if self.rear is None:
            self.front = self.rear = node
        else:
            self.rear.next = node
            self.rear = node
        self.size += 1

    def dequeue(self):
        if self.front is None:
            return None
        node = self.front
        self.front = node.next
        if self.front is None:
            self.rear = None
        self.size -= 1
        return node.data

    def to_list(self):
        result = []
        cur = self.front
        while cur:
            result.append(cur.data)
            cur = cur.next
        return result

    def is_empty(self):
        return self.front is None


# =========================================================
# 3. STRUKTUR DATA: BINARY SEARCH TREE (Visualisasi & Search ID)
# =========================================================
class BSTNode:
    __slots__ = ("id_buku", "judul", "penerbit", "left", "right")

    def __init__(self, id_buku, judul, penerbit):
        self.id_buku = id_buku
        self.judul = judul
        self.penerbit = penerbit
        self.left = None
        self.right = None


class BinarySearchTree:
    def __init__(self):
        self.root = None

    def clear(self):
        self.root = None

    def insert(self, id_buku, judul, penerbit):
        if self.root is None:
            self.root = BSTNode(id_buku, judul, penerbit)
            return
        cur = self.root
        while True:
            if id_buku < cur.id_buku:
                if cur.left is None:
                    cur.left = BSTNode(id_buku, judul, penerbit)
                    return
                cur = cur.left
            elif id_buku > cur.id_buku:
                if cur.right is None:
                    cur.right = BSTNode(id_buku, judul, penerbit)
                    return
                cur = cur.right
            else:
                return  # id sudah ada, abaikan

    def build_from_list(self, items):
        """items: list of (id, judul, penerbit). Insert acak/seimbang dari data terurut."""
        self.clear()
        items_sorted = sorted(items, key=lambda x: x[0])

        def insert_balanced(arr):
            if not arr:
                return
            mid = len(arr) // 2
            i, j, p = arr[mid]
            self.insert(i, j, p)
            insert_balanced(arr[:mid])
            insert_balanced(arr[mid + 1:])

        insert_balanced(items_sorted)

    def search(self, id_buku):
        cur = self.root
        steps = 0
        while cur:
            steps += 1
            if id_buku == cur.id_buku:
                return cur, steps
            elif id_buku < cur.id_buku:
                cur = cur.left
            else:
                cur = cur.right
        return None, steps

    def delete(self, id_buku):
        self.root, deleted = self._delete_rec(self.root, id_buku)
        return deleted

    def _delete_rec(self, node, id_buku):
        if node is None:
            return None, False
        if id_buku < node.id_buku:
            node.left, deleted = self._delete_rec(node.left, id_buku)
            return node, deleted
        elif id_buku > node.id_buku:
            node.right, deleted = self._delete_rec(node.right, id_buku)
            return node, deleted
        else:
            # node ditemukan
            if node.left is None:
                return node.right, True
            if node.right is None:
                return node.left, True
            # 2 anak: cari successor (terkecil di subtree kanan)
            successor = node.right
            while successor.left:
                successor = successor.left
            node.id_buku, node.judul, node.penerbit = successor.id_buku, successor.judul, successor.penerbit
            node.right, _ = self._delete_rec(node.right, successor.id_buku)
            return node, True

    def inorder(self):
        result = []

        def _rec(node):
            if node:
                _rec(node.left)
                result.append((node.id_buku, node.judul, node.penerbit))
                _rec(node.right)

        _rec(self.root)
        return result

    def preorder(self):
        result = []

        def _rec(node):
            if node:
                result.append((node.id_buku, node.judul, node.penerbit))
                _rec(node.left)
                _rec(node.right)

        _rec(self.root)
        return result

    def postorder(self):
        result = []

        def _rec(node):
            if node:
                _rec(node.left)
                _rec(node.right)
                result.append((node.id_buku, node.judul, node.penerbit))

        _rec(self.root)
        return result

    def get_levels(self):
        """Mengembalikan node per level untuk digambar: list of list of (node, x_hint)"""
        if not self.root:
            return []
        levels = []
        cur_level = [self.root]
        while cur_level:
            levels.append(cur_level)
            next_level = []
            for n in cur_level:
                if n.left:
                    next_level.append(n.left)
                if n.right:
                    next_level.append(n.right)
            cur_level = next_level
        return levels


# =========================================================
# 4. WARNA / TEMA (Dark & Light Mode)
# =========================================================
THEMES = {
    "light": {
        "bg": "#eef0f5",
        "panel_bg": "#ffffff",
        "fg": "#1c1e26",
        "subtle_fg": "#6b7280",
        "entry_bg": "#ffffff",
        "entry_fg": "#1c1e26",
        "tree_bg": "#ffffff",
        "tree_fg": "#1c1e26",
        "tree_heading_bg": "#f3f4f8",
        "tree_select": "#6366f1",
        "tree_stripe": "#f7f8fb",
        "btn_bg": "#f3f4f8",
        "btn_fg": "#1c1e26",
        "btn_active": "#e4e6ef",
        "accent": "#6366f1",
        "accent_dark": "#4f46e5",
        "danger": "#ef4444",
        "success": "#10b981",
        "border": "#e2e4ec",
        "titlebar": "#1c1e26",
        "titlebar_fg": "#f5f5fa",
        "canvas_bg": "#fbfbfe",
        "node_fill": "#6366f1",
        "node_fill2": "#8b5cf6",
        "node_fg": "#ffffff",
        "node_root": "#f59e0b",
        "edge": "#c6c9d6",
    },
    "dark": {
        "bg": "#13141a",
        "panel_bg": "#1b1d26",
        "fg": "#eceef3",
        "subtle_fg": "#9095a6",
        "entry_bg": "#262834",
        "entry_fg": "#f0f1f6",
        "tree_bg": "#1b1d26",
        "tree_fg": "#eceef3",
        "tree_heading_bg": "#262834",
        "tree_select": "#818cf8",
        "tree_stripe": "#21232e",
        "btn_bg": "#262834",
        "btn_fg": "#eceef3",
        "btn_active": "#323542",
        "accent": "#818cf8",
        "accent_dark": "#6366f1",
        "danger": "#f87171",
        "success": "#34d399",
        "border": "#2c2f3b",
        "titlebar": "#0d0e13",
        "titlebar_fg": "#f0f1f6",
        "canvas_bg": "#15161e",
        "node_fill": "#818cf8",
        "node_fill2": "#a78bfa",
        "node_fg": "#0d0e13",
        "node_root": "#fbbf24",
        "edge": "#3a3d4c",
    },
}


# =========================================================
# 5. APLIKASI UTAMA
# =========================================================
class LibraryApp:
    DATA_FILE = "perpustakaan_data.json"
    TITLEBAR_HEIGHT = 76

    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title("Sistem Perpustakaan Digital")
        self.root.geometry("1280x920")
        self.root.minsize(1000, 700)

        self.sll = SinglyLinkedList()
        self.queue = Queue()
        self.bst = BinarySearchTree()
        self.buku_dipinjam = set()

        self.theme_name = "light"
        self.theme = THEMES[self.theme_name]

        self.style = ttk.Style()
        self.style.theme_use("clam")

        self._batik_raw = None
        self._batik_photo = None
        self._load_batik_image()

        self._load_sample_data()
        self._build_ui()
        self._apply_theme()
        self._refresh_table()
        self._rebuild_bst()

    # -----------------------------------------------------
    # GAMBAR BATIK UNTUK TITLE BAR
    # -----------------------------------------------------
    def _load_batik_image(self):
        if not PIL_AVAILABLE:
            self._batik_raw = None
            return
        try:
            raw_bytes = base64.b64decode(BATIK_BASE64)
            self._batik_raw = Image.open(io.BytesIO(raw_bytes)).convert("RGB")
        except Exception:
            self._batik_raw = None

    def _render_batik_titlebar(self, width, height):
        """Render gambar batik agar memenuhi titlebar (cover-fit) + sedikit digelapkan
        supaya teks & tombol di atasnya tetap terbaca."""
        if self._batik_raw is None or width <= 1 or height <= 1:
            return None

        img = self._batik_raw
        src_w, src_h = img.size
        scale = max(width / src_w, height / src_h)
        new_w, new_h = max(1, int(src_w * scale)), max(1, int(src_h * scale))
        resized = img.resize((new_w, new_h), Image.LANCZOS)

        left = (new_w - width) // 2
        top = (new_h - height) // 2
        cropped = resized.crop((left, top, left + width, top + height))

        # gelapkan supaya teks/icon putih tetap kontras di atas motif batik
        darken_factor = 0.45 if self.theme_name == "light" else 0.32
        cropped = ImageEnhance.Brightness(cropped).enhance(darken_factor)

        self._batik_photo = ImageTk.PhotoImage(cropped)
        return self._batik_photo

    def _refresh_titlebar_bg(self, event=None):
        if not hasattr(self, "titlebar_canvas"):
            return
        w = self.titlebar_canvas.winfo_width()
        h = self.titlebar_canvas.winfo_height()
        if w <= 1 or h <= 1:
            return
        photo = self._render_batik_titlebar(w, h)
        self.titlebar_canvas.delete("bg")
        if photo is not None:
            self.titlebar_canvas.create_image(0, 0, image=photo, anchor="nw", tags="bg")
        else:
            self.titlebar_canvas.configure(bg=self.theme["titlebar"])
        self.titlebar_canvas.tag_lower("bg")

    # -----------------------------------------------------
    # DATA AWAL (contoh sesuai gambar)
    # -----------------------------------------------------
    def _load_sample_data(self):
        sample = []
        for i, j, p in sample:
            self.sll.append(i, j, p)

    # -----------------------------------------------------
    # BUILD UI
    # -----------------------------------------------------
    def _build_ui(self):
        # ---- Title bar dengan latar motif batik ----
        self.titlebar = tk.Frame(self.root, height=self.TITLEBAR_HEIGHT)
        self.titlebar.pack(fill="x", side="top")
        self.titlebar.pack_propagate(False)

        # Canvas dipakai sebagai kanvas gambar batik (cover seluruh title bar)
        self.titlebar_canvas = tk.Canvas(self.titlebar, height=self.TITLEBAR_HEIGHT,
                                          highlightthickness=0, bd=0)
        self.titlebar_canvas.place(x=0, y=0, relwidth=1, relheight=1)
        self.titlebar_canvas.bind("<Configure>", self._refresh_titlebar_bg)

        # Judul aplikasi (teks "UAS Struktur Data" dihilangkan)
        self.title_label = tk.Label(
            self.titlebar, text="📚  Sistem Perpustakaan Digital",
            font=("Segoe UI", 14, "bold"), anchor="w",
            bg=self.theme["titlebar"], fg="#ffffff"
        )
        self.title_label.place(x=22, y=14)

        # ---- Tombol Dark Mode dipindah ke pojok KIRI BAWAH jendela ----
        self.theme_btn = tk.Button(
            self.root, text="🌙  Dark Mode", relief="flat", bd=0,
            font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"), command=self.toggle_theme, cursor="hand2",
            padx=16, pady=8
        )
        self.theme_btn.place(x=18, rely=1.0, y=-18, anchor="sw")

        # ---- Notebook (Tabs) ----
        self.notebook = ttk.Notebook(self.root, style="App.TNotebook")
        self.notebook.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=8, pady=(0, 8))

        self.tab_inventaris = tk.Frame(self.notebook)
        self.tab_queue = tk.Frame(self.notebook)
        self.tab_bst = tk.Frame(self.notebook)
        self.tab_laporan = tk.Frame(self.notebook)

        self.notebook.add(self.tab_inventaris, text="Inventaris & Pencarian")
        self.notebook.add(self.tab_queue, text="Antrean Transaksi (Queue)")
        self.notebook.add(self.tab_bst, text="Visualisasi Struktur BST")
        self.notebook.add(self.tab_laporan, text="Laporan, Siklus & JSON")

        self._build_tab_inventaris()
        self._build_tab_queue()
        self._build_tab_bst()
        self._build_tab_laporan()

        self.notebook.bind("<<NotebookTabChanged>>", self._on_tab_changed)

    # -----------------------------------------------------
    # TAB 1: INVENTARIS & PENCARIAN
    # -----------------------------------------------------
    def _build_tab_inventaris(self):
        f = self.tab_inventaris

        main = tk.Frame(f)
        main.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=14, pady=14)

        sidebar = tk.Frame(main, width=300)
        sidebar.pack(side="left", fill="y", padx=(0, 14))
        sidebar.pack_propagate(False)

        right = tk.Frame(main)
        right.pack(side="left", fill="both", expand=True)

        # --- Input Buku Baru ---
        input_frame = tk.LabelFrame(sidebar, text="Input Buku Baru (SLL)", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                     padx=14, pady=14)
        input_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 12))

        tk.Label(input_frame, text="ID Buku (Int):", font=("Segoe UI", 10)).pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 2))
        self.entry_id = tk.Entry(input_frame, font=("Segoe UI", 10), relief="solid", bd=1)
        self.entry_id.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 10))

        tk.Label(input_frame, text="Judul:", font=("Segoe UI", 10)).pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 2))
        self.entry_judul = tk.Entry(input_frame, font=("Segoe UI", 10), relief="solid", bd=1)
        self.entry_judul.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 10))

        tk.Label(input_frame, text="Penerbit:", font=("Segoe UI", 10)).pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 2))
        self.entry_penerbit = tk.Entry(input_frame, font=("Segoe UI", 10), relief="solid", bd=1)
        self.entry_penerbit.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 12))

        self.btn_tambah = tk.Button(input_frame, text="Tambah Buku", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                     relief="raised", bd=1, cursor="hand2", command=self.tambah_buku)
        self.btn_tambah.pack(fill="x")

        # --- Search & Sort Engine ---
        search_frame = tk.LabelFrame(sidebar, text="Searching & Sorting Engine", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                      padx=14, pady=14)
        search_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 12))

        tk.Label(search_frame, text="Cari Judul / ID:", font=("Segoe UI", 10)).pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 2))
        self.entry_search = tk.Entry(search_frame, font=("Segoe UI", 10), relief="solid", bd=1)
        self.entry_search.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 10))

        btn_specs = [
            ("Linear Search (Judul)", self.linear_search),
            ("Binary Search (ID)", self.binary_search),
            ("Sort by ID", self.sort_by_id),
            ("Sort Alphabet", self.sort_alphabet),
            ("Reset View", self.reset_view),
        ]
        self.search_buttons = []
        for label, cmd in btn_specs:
            b = tk.Button(search_frame, text=label, font=("Segoe UI", 10), relief="raised", bd=1,
                          cursor="hand2", command=cmd)
            b.pack(fill="x", pady=3)
            self.search_buttons.append(b)

        self.btn_hapus = tk.Button(sidebar, text="Hapus Buku Terpilih", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                    relief="raised", bd=1, cursor="hand2", command=self.hapus_buku)
        self.btn_hapus.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))

        self.status_label = tk.Label(sidebar, text="", font=("Segoe UI", 9, "italic"),
                                      wraplength=280, justify="left")
        self.status_label.pack(anchor="w")

        # --- Tabel (panel kanan) ---
        table_frame = tk.Frame(right)
        table_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

        columns = ("id", "judul", "penerbit")
        self.tree = ttk.Treeview(table_frame, columns=columns, show="headings",
                                  style="App.Treeview", selectmode="browse")
        self.tree.heading("id", text="ID Buku")
        self.tree.heading("judul", text="Judul Buku")
        self.tree.heading("penerbit", text="Nama Penerbit")
        self.tree.column("id", width=100, anchor="center")
        self.tree.column("judul", width=500, anchor="w")
        self.tree.column("penerbit", width=300, anchor="w")
        self.tree.pack(fill="both", expand=True, side="left")

        scrollbar = ttk.Scrollbar(table_frame, orient="vertical", command=self.tree.yview)
        self.tree.configure(yscroll=scrollbar.set)
        scrollbar.pack(side="right", fill="y")

    # -----------------------------------------------------
    # TAB 2: ANTREAN TRANSAKSI (QUEUE)
    # -----------------------------------------------------
    def _build_tab_queue(self):
        f = self.tab_queue

        main = tk.Frame(f)
        main.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=14, pady=14)

        sidebar = tk.Frame(main, width=300)
        sidebar.pack(side="left", fill="y", padx=(0, 14))
        sidebar.pack_propagate(False)

        right = tk.Frame(main)
        right.pack(side="left", fill="both", expand=True)

        input_frame = tk.LabelFrame(sidebar, text="Buat Transaksi Baru (Enqueue)", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                     padx=14, pady=14)
        input_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 12))

        tk.Label(input_frame, text="ID Buku:", font=("Segoe UI", 10)).pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 2))
        self.q_entry_id = tk.Entry(input_frame, font=("Segoe UI", 10), relief="solid", bd=1)
        self.q_entry_id.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 10))

        tk.Label(input_frame, text="ID Anggota:", font=("Segoe UI", 10)).pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 2))
        self.q_entry_anggota = tk.Entry(input_frame, font=("Segoe UI", 10), relief="solid", bd=1)
        self.q_entry_anggota.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 10))

        tk.Label(input_frame, text="Nama Peminjam:", font=("Segoe UI", 10)).pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 2))
        self.q_entry_nama = tk.Entry(input_frame, font=("Segoe UI", 10), relief="solid", bd=1)
        self.q_entry_nama.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 10))

        tk.Label(input_frame, text="Jenis:", font=("Segoe UI", 10)).pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 2))
        self.q_jenis = ttk.Combobox(input_frame, values=["Pinjam", "Kembali"],
                                     state="readonly", font=("Segoe UI", 10))
        self.q_jenis.current(0)
        self.q_jenis.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 12))

        self.btn_enqueue = tk.Button(input_frame, text="Tambah ke Antrean", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                      relief="raised", bd=1, cursor="hand2", command=self.enqueue_transaksi)
        self.btn_enqueue.pack(fill="x")

        self.btn_dequeue = tk.Button(sidebar, text="Proses Antrean Terdepan\n(Dequeue)",
                                      font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"), relief="raised", bd=1,
                                      cursor="hand2", command=self.dequeue_transaksi)
        self.btn_dequeue.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 8))

        self.q_status_label = tk.Label(sidebar, text="Antrean kosong.", font=("Segoe UI", 9, "italic"),
                                        wraplength=280, justify="left")
        self.q_status_label.pack(anchor="w")

        # --- Tabel antrean (panel kanan) ---
        table_frame = tk.Frame(right)
        table_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

        columns = ("urutan", "id", "anggota", "nama", "jenis", "waktu")
        self.q_tree = ttk.Treeview(table_frame, columns=columns, show="headings", style="App.Treeview")
        headers = {"urutan": "Urutan", "id": "ID Buku", "anggota": "ID Anggota", "nama": "Nama Peminjam",
                   "jenis": "Jenis", "waktu": "Waktu Masuk"}
        widths = {"urutan": 70, "id": 70, "anggota": 90, "nama": 220, "jenis": 90, "waktu": 170}
        for col in columns:
            self.q_tree.heading(col, text=headers[col])
            self.q_tree.column(col, width=widths[col], anchor="center" if col != "nama" else "w")
        self.q_tree.pack(fill="both", expand=True, side="left")

        scrollbar = ttk.Scrollbar(table_frame, orient="vertical", command=self.q_tree.yview)
        self.q_tree.configure(yscroll=scrollbar.set)
        scrollbar.pack(side="right", fill="y")

    # -----------------------------------------------------
    # TAB 3: VISUALISASI BST
    # -----------------------------------------------------
    def _build_tab_bst(self):
        f = self.tab_bst

        main = tk.Frame(f)
        main.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=14, pady=14)

        sidebar = tk.Frame(main, width=300)
        sidebar.pack(side="left", fill="y", padx=(0, 14))
        sidebar.pack_propagate(False)

        right = tk.Frame(main)
        right.pack(side="left", fill="both", expand=True)

        # --- Operasi Tree ---
        op_frame = tk.LabelFrame(sidebar, text="Operasi Tree (BST)", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                  padx=14, pady=14)
        op_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 12))

        tk.Label(op_frame, text="ID Buku:", font=("Segoe UI", 10)).pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 2))
        self.bst_entry_id = tk.Entry(op_frame, font=("Segoe UI", 10), relief="solid", bd=1)
        self.bst_entry_id.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 10))

        tk.Label(op_frame, text="Judul (untuk Insert):", font=("Segoe UI", 10)).pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 2))
        self.bst_entry_judul = tk.Entry(op_frame, font=("Segoe UI", 10), relief="solid", bd=1)
        self.bst_entry_judul.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 10))

        tk.Label(op_frame, text="Penerbit (untuk Insert):", font=("Segoe UI", 10)).pack(anchor="w", pady=(0, 2))
        self.bst_entry_penerbit = tk.Entry(op_frame, font=("Segoe UI", 10), relief="solid", bd=1)
        self.bst_entry_penerbit.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 12))

        self.btn_bst_insert = tk.Button(op_frame, text="➕ Insert", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                         relief="raised", bd=1, cursor="hand2", command=self.bst_insert)
        self.btn_bst_insert.pack(fill="x", pady=3)

        self.btn_bst_search = tk.Button(op_frame, text="🔍 Search", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                         relief="raised", bd=1, cursor="hand2", command=self.bst_search_visual)
        self.btn_bst_search.pack(fill="x", pady=3)

        self.btn_bst_delete = tk.Button(op_frame, text="🗑 Delete", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                         relief="raised", bd=1, cursor="hand2", command=self.bst_delete)
        self.btn_bst_delete.pack(fill="x", pady=3)

        self.btn_rebuild_bst = tk.Button(sidebar, text="Bangun Ulang BST dari Data SLL",
                                          font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"), relief="raised", bd=1,
                                          cursor="hand2", command=self._rebuild_bst)
        self.btn_rebuild_bst.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 12))

        # --- Traversal ---
        trav_frame = tk.LabelFrame(sidebar, text="Traversal", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                    padx=14, pady=14)
        trav_frame.pack(fill="x", pady=(0, 12))

        self.btn_inorder = tk.Button(trav_frame, text="InOrder (Kiri-Akar-Kanan)", font=("Segoe UI", 10),
                                      relief="raised", bd=1, cursor="hand2",
                                      command=lambda: self.bst_traversal("inorder"))
        self.btn_inorder.pack(fill="x", pady=3)

        self.btn_preorder = tk.Button(trav_frame, text="PreOrder (Akar-Kiri-Kanan)", font=("Segoe UI", 10),
                                       relief="raised", bd=1, cursor="hand2",
                                       command=lambda: self.bst_traversal("preorder"))
        self.btn_preorder.pack(fill="x", pady=3)

        self.btn_postorder = tk.Button(trav_frame, text="PostOrder (Kiri-Kanan-Akar)", font=("Segoe UI", 10),
                                        relief="raised", bd=1, cursor="hand2",
                                        command=lambda: self.bst_traversal("postorder"))
        self.btn_postorder.pack(fill="x", pady=3)

        self.bst_info_label = tk.Label(sidebar, text="", font=("Segoe UI", 9, "italic"),
                                        wraplength=280, justify="left")
        self.bst_info_label.pack(anchor="w", pady=(4, 8))

        result_frame = tk.LabelFrame(sidebar, text="Hasil Traversal", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                      padx=10, pady=10)
        result_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True)
        self.bst_result_text = tk.Text(result_frame, font=("Consolas", 9), wrap="word",
                                        relief="flat", height=8)
        self.bst_result_text.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

        # --- Canvas visualisasi (panel kanan) ---
        canvas_frame = tk.Frame(right)
        canvas_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

        self.bst_canvas = tk.Canvas(canvas_frame, highlightthickness=1)
        self.bst_canvas.pack(fill="both", expand=True)
        self.bst_canvas.bind("<Configure>", lambda e: self._draw_bst())

    # -----------------------------------------------------
    # TAB 4: LAPORAN, SIKLUS & JSON
    # -----------------------------------------------------
    def _build_tab_laporan(self):
        f = self.tab_laporan

        top_frame = tk.Frame(f)
        top_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=14, pady=(14, 6))

        self.btn_export = tk.Button(top_frame, text="Export Laporan ke JSON", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                     relief="raised", bd=1, cursor="hand2", command=self.export_json)
        self.btn_export.pack(side="left", padx=4)

        self.btn_import = tk.Button(top_frame, text="Import dari JSON", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                     relief="raised", bd=1, cursor="hand2", command=self.import_json)
        self.btn_import.pack(side="left", padx=4)

        self.btn_refresh_report = tk.Button(top_frame, text="Refresh Laporan", font=("Segoe UI", 10),
                                             relief="raised", bd=1, cursor="hand2", command=self._refresh_report)
        self.btn_refresh_report.pack(side="left", padx=4)

        self.btn_cek_siklus = tk.Button(top_frame, text="🔄 Deteksi Siklus SLL", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                         relief="raised", bd=1, cursor="hand2", command=self.cek_siklus_sll)
        self.btn_cek_siklus.pack(side="left", padx=4)

        stats_frame = tk.LabelFrame(f, text="Statistik & Siklus Sistem", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                     padx=10, pady=10)
        stats_frame.pack(fill="x", padx=14, pady=6)

        self.stat_labels = {}
        stat_keys = [
            ("total_buku", "Total Buku (SLL)"),
            ("total_dipinjam", "Total Buku Dipinjam"),
            ("total_antrean", "Total Antrean Aktif (Queue)"),
            ("status_siklus", "Status Siklus SLL"),
            ("tinggi_bst", "Tinggi Pohon (BST)"),
            ("total_node_bst", "Total Node (BST)"),
        ]
        for i, (key, label) in enumerate(stat_keys):
            tk.Label(stats_frame, text=label + ":", font=("Segoe UI", 10)).grid(
                row=i // 2, column=(i % 2) * 2, sticky="w", padx=8, pady=4)
            val_lbl = tk.Label(stats_frame, text="-", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"))
            val_lbl.grid(row=i // 2, column=(i % 2) * 2 + 1, sticky="w", padx=8, pady=4)
            self.stat_labels[key] = val_lbl

        log_frame = tk.LabelFrame(f, text="Pratinjau Laporan JSON", font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"),
                                   padx=10, pady=10)
        log_frame.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=14, pady=(6, 14))

        self.json_text = tk.Text(log_frame, font=("Consolas", 10), wrap="none", relief="solid", bd=1)
        self.json_text.pack(fill="both", expand=True, side="left")
        json_scroll = ttk.Scrollbar(log_frame, orient="vertical", command=self.json_text.yview)
        self.json_text.configure(yscroll=json_scroll.set)
        json_scroll.pack(side="right", fill="y")

    # =======================================================
    # LOGIKA: INVENTARIS (SLL)
    # =======================================================
    def tambah_buku(self):
        id_str = self.entry_id.get().strip()
        judul = self.entry_judul.get().strip()
        penerbit = self.entry_penerbit.get().strip()

        if not id_str or not judul or not penerbit:
            messagebox.showwarning("Input Tidak Lengkap", "Mohon isi ID, Judul, dan Penerbit.")
            return
        try:
            id_buku = int(id_str)
        except ValueError:
            messagebox.showerror("Input Tidak Valid", "ID Buku harus berupa angka (Int).")
            return

        existing_ids = [i for i, _, _ in self.sll.to_list()]
        if id_buku in existing_ids:
            messagebox.showerror("Duplikat ID", f"ID Buku {id_buku} sudah digunakan.")
            return

        self.sll.append(id_buku, judul, penerbit)
        self.entry_id.delete(0, tk.END)
        self.entry_judul.delete(0, tk.END)
        self.entry_penerbit.delete(0, tk.END)
        self._refresh_table()
        self.set_status(f"Buku '{judul}' berhasil ditambahkan ke Singly Linked List.", ok=True)

    def hapus_buku(self):
        selected = self.tree.selection()
        if not selected:
            messagebox.showwarning("Tidak Ada Seleksi", "Pilih buku pada tabel terlebih dahulu.")
            return
        item = self.tree.item(selected[0])
        id_buku = int(item["values"][0])
        judul = item["values"][1]
        if messagebox.askyesno("Konfirmasi Hapus", f"Hapus buku '{judul}' (ID {id_buku})?"):
            self.sll.delete_by_id(id_buku)
            self._refresh_table()
            self.set_status(f"Buku ID {id_buku} dihapus dari Linked List.", ok=False)

    def _refresh_table(self, data=None):
        self.tree.delete(*self.tree.get_children())
        rows = data if data is not None else self.sll.to_list()
        for idx, (id_buku, judul, penerbit) in enumerate(rows):
            tag = "odd" if idx % 2 else "even"
            self.tree.insert("", "end", values=(id_buku, judul, penerbit), tags=(tag,))

    def linear_search(self):
        keyword = self.entry_search.get().strip()
        if not keyword:
            messagebox.showinfo("Linear Search", "Masukkan kata kunci judul.")
            return
        result = self.sll.linear_search_judul(keyword)
        self._refresh_table(result)
        self.set_status(f"Linear Search: ditemukan {len(result)} hasil untuk '{keyword}'.", ok=True)

    def binary_search(self):
        keyword = self.entry_search.get().strip()
        if not keyword:
            messagebox.showinfo("Binary Search", "Masukkan ID Buku untuk dicari.")
            return
        try:
            target_id = int(keyword)
        except ValueError:
            messagebox.showerror("Input Tidak Valid", "Binary Search membutuhkan ID berupa angka.")
            return

        items = sorted(self.sll.to_list(), key=lambda x: x[0])
        lo, hi = 0, len(items) - 1
        steps = 0
        found = None
        while lo <= hi:
            steps += 1
            mid = (lo + hi) // 2
            if items[mid][0] == target_id:
                found = items[mid]
                break
            elif items[mid][0] < target_id:
                lo = mid + 1
            else:
                hi = mid - 1

        if found:
            self._refresh_table([found])
            self.set_status(f"Binary Search: ID {target_id} ditemukan dalam {steps} langkah.", ok=True)
        else:
            self._refresh_table([])
            self.set_status(f"Binary Search: ID {target_id} tidak ditemukan ({steps} langkah).", ok=False)

    def sort_by_id(self):
        self.sll.sort_by_id()
        self._refresh_table()
        self.set_status("Data diurutkan berdasarkan ID Buku (Sort by ID).", ok=True)

    def sort_alphabet(self):
        self.sll.sort_alphabet()
        self._refresh_table()
        self.set_status("Data diurutkan berdasarkan Judul (Alfabetis).", ok=True)

    def reset_view(self):
        self.entry_search.delete(0, tk.END)
        self._refresh_table()
        self.set_status("Tampilan direset ke data lengkap.", ok=True)

    def set_status(self, text, ok=True):
        color = self.theme["success"] if ok else self.theme["danger"]
        self.status_label.config(text=text, fg=color)

    # =======================================================
    # LOGIKA: QUEUE (ANTREAN TRANSAKSI)
    # =======================================================
    def enqueue_transaksi(self):
        id_str = self.q_entry_id.get().strip()
        anggota = self.q_entry_anggota.get().strip()
        nama = self.q_entry_nama.get().strip()
        jenis = self.q_jenis.get()

        if not id_str or not nama or not anggota:
            messagebox.showwarning("Input Tidak Lengkap", "Mohon isi ID Buku, ID Anggota, dan Nama Peminjam.")
            return
        try:
            id_buku = int(id_str)
        except ValueError:
            messagebox.showerror("Input Tidak Valid", "ID Buku harus berupa angka.")
            return

        waktu = datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
        data = {"id_buku": id_buku, "id_anggota": anggota, "nama": nama, "jenis": jenis, "waktu": waktu}
        self.queue.enqueue(data)

        self.q_entry_id.delete(0, tk.END)
        self.q_entry_anggota.delete(0, tk.END)
        self.q_entry_nama.delete(0, tk.END)
        self._refresh_queue_table()
        self.q_status_label.config(
            text=f"Transaksi '{nama}' (ID {id_buku}) ditambahkan ke antrean.",
            fg=self.theme["success"]
        )

    def dequeue_transaksi(self):
        if self.queue.is_empty():
            messagebox.showinfo("Antrean Kosong", "Tidak ada transaksi dalam antrean.")
            return
        data = self.queue.dequeue()
        # update status buku dipinjam
        if data["jenis"] == "Pinjam":
            self.buku_dipinjam.add(data["id_buku"])
        elif data["jenis"] == "Kembali":
            self.buku_dipinjam.discard(data["id_buku"])
        self._refresh_queue_table()
        self.q_status_label.config(
            text=f"Diproses: {data['jenis']} - {data['nama']} (ID Buku {data['id_buku']}).",
            fg=self.theme["accent"]
        )

    def _refresh_queue_table(self):
        self.q_tree.delete(*self.q_tree.get_children())
        for idx, data in enumerate(self.queue.to_list(), start=1):
            tag = "odd" if idx % 2 else "even"
            self.q_tree.insert("", "end", values=(idx, data["id_buku"], data.get("id_anggota", "-"),
                                                    data["nama"], data["jenis"], data["waktu"]),
                                tags=(tag,))

    # =======================================================
    # LOGIKA: BST (VISUALISASI & OPERASI)
    # =======================================================
    def _rebuild_bst(self):
        self.bst.build_from_list(self.sll.to_list())
        self._draw_bst()
        self.bst_info_label.config(text=f"BST dibangun ulang dengan {len(self.sll.to_list())} node.",
                                    fg=self.theme["subtle_fg"])

    def _get_bst_id_input(self):
        keyword = self.bst_entry_id.get().strip()
        if not keyword:
            messagebox.showinfo("Input Kosong", "Masukkan ID Buku terlebih dahulu.")
            return None
        try:
            return int(keyword)
        except ValueError:
            messagebox.showerror("Input Tidak Valid", "ID harus berupa angka.")
            return None

    def bst_insert(self):
        target_id = self._get_bst_id_input()
        if target_id is None:
            return
        judul = self.bst_entry_judul.get().strip() or f"Buku {target_id}"
        penerbit = self.bst_entry_penerbit.get().strip() or "-"

        existing, _ = self.bst.search(target_id)
        if existing:
            messagebox.showerror("ID Sudah Ada", f"ID Buku {target_id} sudah ada di dalam BST.")
            return

        self.bst.insert(target_id, judul, penerbit)
        self.bst_entry_id.delete(0, tk.END)
        self.bst_entry_judul.delete(0, tk.END)
        self.bst_entry_penerbit.delete(0, tk.END)
        self._draw_bst(highlight_id=target_id)
        self.bst_info_label.config(text=f"Node ID {target_id} berhasil di-Insert ke BST.",
                                    fg=self.theme["success"])

    def bst_search_visual(self):
        target_id = self._get_bst_id_input()
        if target_id is None:
            return
        node, steps = self.bst.search(target_id)
        if node:
            self.bst_info_label.config(
                text=f"Search: ID {target_id} ('{node.judul}') ditemukan dalam {steps} langkah.",
                fg=self.theme["success"]
            )
        else:
            self.bst_info_label.config(
                text=f"Search: ID {target_id} tidak ditemukan ({steps} langkah).",
                fg=self.theme["danger"]
            )
        self._draw_bst(highlight_id=target_id if node else None)

    def bst_delete(self):
        target_id = self._get_bst_id_input()
        if target_id is None:
            return
        node, _ = self.bst.search(target_id)
        if not node:
            messagebox.showinfo("Tidak Ditemukan", f"ID Buku {target_id} tidak ada di BST.")
            return
        if messagebox.askyesno("Konfirmasi Delete", f"Hapus node ID {target_id} dari BST?"):
            self.bst.delete(target_id)
            self.bst_entry_id.delete(0, tk.END)
            self._draw_bst()
            self.bst_info_label.config(text=f"Node ID {target_id} berhasil di-Delete dari BST.",
                                        fg=self.theme["danger"])

    def bst_traversal(self, mode):
        if self.bst.root is None:
            self.bst_result_text.delete("1.0", tk.END)
            self.bst_result_text.insert("1.0", "BST masih kosong.")
            return

        if mode == "inorder":
            data = self.bst.inorder()
            label = "InOrder (Kiri → Akar → Kanan)"
        elif mode == "preorder":
            data = self.bst.preorder()
            label = "PreOrder (Akar → Kiri → Kanan)"
        else:
            data = self.bst.postorder()
            label = "PostOrder (Kiri → Kanan → Akar)"

        urutan_id = " → ".join(str(i) for i, _, _ in data)
        detail = "\n".join(f"{i:>4}  {j}  ({p})" for i, j, p in data)

        self.bst_result_text.delete("1.0", tk.END)
        self.bst_result_text.insert("1.0", f"{label}\n\nUrutan ID:\n{urutan_id}\n\nDetail:\n{detail}")
        self.bst_info_label.config(text=f"{label} selesai — {len(data)} node.", fg=self.theme["accent"])

    def _draw_bst(self, highlight_id=None):
        canvas = self.bst_canvas
        canvas.delete("all")
        canvas.configure(bg=self.theme["canvas_bg"])

        levels = self.bst.get_levels()
        if not levels:
            w = canvas.winfo_width() or 800
            h = canvas.winfo_height() or 400
            canvas.create_text(
                w // 2, h // 2,
                text="🌳  BST kosong\nKlik 'Bangun Ulang BST dari Data SLL' untuk memulai",
                fill=self.theme["subtle_fg"], font=("Segoe UI", 12), justify="center"
            )
            return

        width = max(canvas.winfo_width(), 500)
        height = max(canvas.winfo_height(), 360)
        max_depth = len(levels)
        top_margin = 50
        v_gap = max(85, (height - top_margin - 50) // max(max_depth, 1))

        positions = {}

        def assign_positions(node, depth, x_min, x_max):
            if node is None:
                return
            x = (x_min + x_max) / 2
            y = top_margin + depth * v_gap
            positions[id(node)] = (x, y, node, depth)
            assign_positions(node.left, depth + 1, x_min, x)
            assign_positions(node.right, depth + 1, x, x_max)

        assign_positions(self.bst.root, 0, 30, width - 30)

        # palet gradasi per level (interpolasi antara node_fill -> node_fill2)
        def hex_to_rgb(h):
            h = h.lstrip("#")
            return tuple(int(h[i:i + 2], 16) for i in (0, 2, 4))

        def rgb_to_hex(rgb):
            return "#%02x%02x%02x" % tuple(max(0, min(255, int(c))) for c in rgb)

        c1 = hex_to_rgb(self.theme["node_fill"])
        c2 = hex_to_rgb(self.theme["node_fill2"])

        def level_color(depth):
            ratio = depth / max(max_depth - 1, 1)
            return rgb_to_hex(tuple(c1[i] + (c2[i] - c1[i]) * ratio for i in range(3)))

        # --- gambar edge dengan kurva halus + radius lengkung kecil ---
        def draw_edges(node):
            if node is None:
                return
            x1, y1, _, _ = positions[id(node)]
            for child in (node.left, node.right):
                if child:
                    x2, y2, _, _ = positions[id(child)]
                    my = (y1 + y2) / 2
                    canvas.create_line(
                        x1, y1 + 24, x1, my, x2, my, x2, y2 - 24,
                        fill=self.theme["edge"], width=2.4, smooth=True, splinesteps=24,
                        capstyle="round"
                    )
                    draw_edges(child)

        draw_edges(self.bst.root)

        # --- gambar node (lingkaran dengan shadow halus + label kartu judul) ---
        radius = 24
        for x, y, node, depth in positions.values():
            is_root = node is self.bst.root
            is_hit = highlight_id is not None and node.id_buku == highlight_id

            fill = self.theme["node_root"] if is_root else level_color(depth)
            if is_hit:
                fill = self.theme["success"]

            # shadow lembut
            canvas.create_oval(x - radius + 2, y - radius + 4, x + radius + 2, y + radius + 4,
                                fill=self.theme["bg"], outline="", stipple="gray50")

            outline_color = "#ffffff" if self.theme_name == "light" else self.theme["panel_bg"]
            canvas.create_oval(x - radius, y - radius, x + radius, y + radius,
                                fill=fill, outline=outline_color, width=2.5)

            canvas.create_text(x, y, text=str(node.id_buku), fill=self.theme["node_fg"] if not is_root else "#1c1e26",
                                font=("Segoe UI", 11, "bold"))

            # kartu judul kecil di bawah node
            label = node.judul if len(node.judul) <= 16 else node.judul[:14] + "…"
            canvas.create_text(x, y + radius + 14, text=label,
                                fill=self.theme["fg"], font=("Segoe UI", 8, "bold"))
            canvas.create_text(x, y + radius + 28, text=node.penerbit,
                                fill=self.theme["subtle_fg"], font=("Segoe UI", 7))

        # --- legenda kecil ---
        legend_y = height - 22
        canvas.create_oval(24, legend_y - 6, 36, legend_y + 6, fill=self.theme["node_root"], outline="")
        canvas.create_text(44, legend_y, text="Root", anchor="w", fill=self.theme["subtle_fg"],
                            font=("Segoe UI", 8))
        canvas.create_oval(110, legend_y - 6, 122, legend_y + 6, fill=self.theme["node_fill"], outline="")
        canvas.create_text(130, legend_y, text="Node", anchor="w", fill=self.theme["subtle_fg"],
                            font=("Segoe UI", 8))
        canvas.create_oval(200, legend_y - 6, 212, legend_y + 6, fill=self.theme["success"], outline="")
        canvas.create_text(220, legend_y, text="Hasil Pencarian", anchor="w", fill=self.theme["subtle_fg"],
                            font=("Segoe UI", 8))

    # =======================================================
    # LOGIKA: LAPORAN & JSON
    # =======================================================
    def deteksi_siklus_sll(self):
        """Floyd's Cycle Detection (tortoise & hare) pada Singly Linked List."""
        slow = self.sll.head
        fast = self.sll.head
        while fast and fast.next:
            slow = slow.next
            fast = fast.next.next
            if slow is fast:
                return True  # ada siklus
        return False  # sampai NULL, tidak ada siklus

    def cek_siklus_sll(self):
        ada_siklus = self.deteksi_siklus_sll()
        if ada_siklus:
            messagebox.showerror("⚠ Siklus Terdeteksi",
                                  "Linked List mengandung SIKLUS (tidak berakhir di NULL)!")
            self.stat_labels["status_siklus"].config(text="❌ SIKLUS!", fg=self.theme["danger"])
        else:
            messagebox.showinfo("✓ Aman", "Linked List normal, berakhir di NULL. Tidak ada siklus.")
            self.stat_labels["status_siklus"].config(text="✓ Aman (NULL)", fg=self.theme["success"])

    def _build_report_dict(self):
        items = self.sll.to_list()
        inorder = self.bst.inorder()
        return {
            "generated_at": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
            "total_buku": len(items),
            "total_buku_dipinjam": len(self.buku_dipinjam),
            "id_buku_dipinjam": sorted(self.buku_dipinjam),
            "siklus_terdeteksi": self.deteksi_siklus_sll(),
            "buku": [{"id_buku": i, "judul": j, "penerbit": p} for i, j, p in items],
            "antrean_transaksi": self.queue.to_list(),
            "bst_inorder": [{"id_buku": i, "judul": j, "penerbit": p} for i, j, p in inorder],
        }

    def _bst_height(self, node):
        if node is None:
            return 0
        return 1 + max(self._bst_height(node.left), self._bst_height(node.right))

    def _bst_count(self, node):
        if node is None:
            return 0
        return 1 + self._bst_count(node.left) + self._bst_count(node.right)

    def _refresh_report(self):
        report = self._build_report_dict()
        self.stat_labels["total_buku"].config(text=str(report["total_buku"]))
        self.stat_labels["total_dipinjam"].config(text=str(report["total_buku_dipinjam"]))
        self.stat_labels["total_antrean"].config(text=str(self.queue.size))
        self.stat_labels["tinggi_bst"].config(text=str(self._bst_height(self.bst.root)))
        self.stat_labels["total_node_bst"].config(text=str(self._bst_count(self.bst.root)))
        if report["siklus_terdeteksi"]:
            self.stat_labels["status_siklus"].config(text="❌ SIKLUS!", fg=self.theme["danger"])
        else:
            self.stat_labels["status_siklus"].config(text="✓ Aman (NULL)", fg=self.theme["success"])

        self.json_text.delete("1.0", tk.END)
        self.json_text.insert("1.0", json.dumps(report, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False))

    def export_json(self):
        self._refresh_report()
        report = self._build_report_dict()
        path = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), self.DATA_FILE)
        try:
            with open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as fp:
                json.dump(report, fp, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
            messagebox.showinfo("Export Berhasil", f"Laporan berhasil disimpan ke:\n{path}")
        except Exception as e:
            messagebox.showerror("Export Gagal", str(e))

    def import_json(self):
        path = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), self.DATA_FILE)
        if not os.path.exists(path):
            messagebox.showerror("File Tidak Ditemukan", f"File {self.DATA_FILE} tidak ditemukan di:\n{path}")
            return
        try:
            with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as fp:
                report = json.load(fp)
            self.sll.clear()
            for b in report.get("buku", []):
                self.sll.append(b["id_buku"], b["judul"], b["penerbit"])
            self._refresh_table()
            self._rebuild_bst()
            self._refresh_report()
            messagebox.showinfo("Import Berhasil", "Data buku berhasil dimuat dari JSON.")
        except Exception as e:
            messagebox.showerror("Import Gagal", str(e))

    def _on_tab_changed(self, event):
        tab_text = event.widget.tab(event.widget.select(), "text")
        if tab_text == "Visualisasi Struktur BST":
            self._draw_bst()
        elif tab_text == "Laporan, Siklus & JSON":
            self._refresh_report()

    # =======================================================
    # TEMA / DARK MODE
    # =======================================================
    def toggle_theme(self):
        self.theme_name = "dark" if self.theme_name == "light" else "light"
        self.theme = THEMES[self.theme_name]
        self._apply_theme()
        self._refresh_titlebar_bg()
        self._draw_bst()

    def _apply_theme(self):
        t = self.theme
        self.root.configure(bg=t["bg"])

        # title bar tetap memakai gambar batik sebagai background;
        # hanya warna teks judul yang menyesuaikan tema.
        self.title_label.configure(bg=t["titlebar"], fg="#ffffff")

        self.theme_btn.configure(
            bg=t["accent"], fg="#ffffff", activebackground=t["accent_dark"],
            activeforeground="#ffffff", relief="flat",
            text=("☀  Light Mode" if self.theme_name == "dark" else "🌙  Dark Mode")
        )

        # ttk styles
        self.style.configure("App.TNotebook", background=t["bg"], borderwidth=0)
        self.style.configure("App.TNotebook.Tab", background=t["btn_bg"], foreground=t["subtle_fg"],
                              padding=(18, 10), font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"), borderwidth=0)
        self.style.map("App.TNotebook.Tab",
                        background=[("selected", t["panel_bg"])],
                        foreground=[("selected", t["accent"])])

        self.style.configure("App.Treeview", background=t["tree_bg"], fieldbackground=t["tree_bg"],
                              foreground=t["tree_fg"], rowheight=30, font=("Segoe UI", 10), borderwidth=0)
        self.style.configure("App.Treeview.Heading", background=t["tree_heading_bg"], foreground=t["fg"],
                              font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"), relief="flat")
        self.style.map("App.Treeview", background=[("selected", t["tree_select"])],
                        foreground=[("selected", "#ffffff")])
        self.style.layout("App.Treeview", self.style.layout("Treeview"))

        self.notebook.configure(style="App.TNotebook")

        # recursively theme tk widgets in tabs
        for tab in (self.tab_inventaris, self.tab_queue, self.tab_bst, self.tab_laporan):
            self._theme_widget_tree(tab, t)

        self.tree.configure(style="App.Treeview")
        self.q_tree.configure(style="App.Treeview")
        self._stripe_treeview(self.tree, t)
        self._stripe_treeview(self.q_tree, t)

        self.bst_canvas.configure(bg=t["canvas_bg"], highlightbackground=t["border"], highlightthickness=1)
        self.json_text.configure(bg=t["entry_bg"], fg=t["entry_fg"], insertbackground=t["fg"],
                                  relief="flat", highlightthickness=1,
                                  highlightbackground=t["border"], highlightcolor=t["accent"])
        if hasattr(self, "bst_result_text"):
            self.bst_result_text.configure(bg=t["entry_bg"], fg=t["entry_fg"], insertbackground=t["fg"],
                                            relief="flat", highlightthickness=1,
                                            highlightbackground=t["border"], highlightcolor=t["accent"])

        # styling tombol aksen utama vs sekunder
        self._style_button(getattr(self, "btn_tambah", None), t, primary=True)
        self._style_button(getattr(self, "btn_hapus", None), t, danger=True)
        self._style_button(getattr(self, "btn_enqueue", None), t, primary=True)
        self._style_button(getattr(self, "btn_dequeue", None), t, primary=True)
        self._style_button(getattr(self, "btn_export", None), t, primary=True)
        self._style_button(getattr(self, "btn_import", None), t)
        self._style_button(getattr(self, "btn_refresh_report", None), t)
        self._style_button(getattr(self, "btn_cek_siklus", None), t, danger=True)
        self._style_button(getattr(self, "btn_rebuild_bst", None), t)
        self._style_button(getattr(self, "btn_bst_insert", None), t, primary=True)
        self._style_button(getattr(self, "btn_bst_search", None), t)
        self._style_button(getattr(self, "btn_bst_delete", None), t, danger=True)
        self._style_button(getattr(self, "btn_inorder", None), t)
        self._style_button(getattr(self, "btn_preorder", None), t)
        self._style_button(getattr(self, "btn_postorder", None), t)
        for b in getattr(self, "search_buttons", []):
            self._style_button(b, t)

        if hasattr(self, "status_label"):
            self.status_label.configure(bg=t["panel_bg"], fg=t["subtle_fg"])
        if hasattr(self, "q_status_label"):
            self.q_status_label.configure(bg=t["panel_bg"], fg=t["subtle_fg"])
        if hasattr(self, "bst_info_label"):
            self.bst_info_label.configure(bg=t["panel_bg"], fg=t["subtle_fg"])

    def _style_button(self, btn, t, primary=False, danger=False):
        if btn is None:
            return
        if danger:
            bg, fg, active = t["danger"], "#ffffff", t["danger"]
        elif primary:
            bg, fg, active = t["accent"], "#ffffff", t["accent_dark"]
        else:
            bg, fg, active = t["btn_bg"], t["fg"], t["btn_active"]
        btn.configure(bg=bg, fg=fg, activebackground=active, activeforeground=fg,
                      relief="flat", bd=0, cursor="hand2", padx=12, pady=6,
                      font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"))

    def _stripe_treeview(self, tree, t):
        tree.tag_configure("odd", background=t["tree_stripe"])
        tree.tag_configure("even", background=t["tree_bg"])

    def _theme_widget_tree(self, widget, t):
        cls = widget.winfo_class()
        try:
            if cls in ("Frame",):
                widget.configure(bg=t["panel_bg"])
            elif cls == "Labelframe":
                widget.configure(bg=t["panel_bg"], fg=t["accent"], relief="flat", bd=0,
                                  highlightbackground=t["border"], highlightthickness=1,
                                  font=("Segoe UI", 10, "bold"))
            elif cls == "Label":
                widget.configure(bg=t["panel_bg"], fg=t["fg"])
            elif cls == "Button":
                widget.configure(bg=t["btn_bg"], fg=t["btn_fg"], activebackground=t["btn_active"],
                                  activeforeground=t["fg"])
            elif cls == "Entry":
                widget.configure(bg=t["entry_bg"], fg=t["entry_fg"], insertbackground=t["fg"],
                                  highlightbackground=t["border"], highlightcolor=t["accent"])
            elif cls == "Canvas":
                widget.configure(bg=t["canvas_bg"])
            elif cls == "Text":
                widget.configure(bg=t["entry_bg"], fg=t["entry_fg"], insertbackground=t["fg"])
        except tk.TclError:
            pass
        for child in widget.winfo_children():
            self._theme_widget_tree(child, t)


def main():
    root = tk.Tk()

    def launch_main_app(nama_pengguna):
        # bersihkan jendela login lalu bangun aplikasi utama di window yang sama
        for w in root.winfo_children():
            w.destroy()
        root.unbind("<Return>")
        root.title("Sistem Perpustakaan Digital")
        root.geometry("1280x920")
        root.minsize(1000, 700)
        app = LibraryApp(root)
        root.after(150, lambda: None)  # noop, jaga referensi app dari GC
        root._app_ref = app
        root._user_ref = nama_pengguna

    LoginWindow(root, on_success=launch_main_app)
    root.mainloop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
